response: The iPhone 15 Pro has a starting price of $999, featuring a 6.1-inch OLED display, an A17 Pro chip, a 48MP main camera, and a 3274mAh battery. It is offered in four storage capacities: 128GB, 256GB, 512GB, and 1TB, weighs 187 grams, and has received an overall customer rating of 4.6 out of 5.
